nasb.text: “And you shall make the altar of acacia wood, five cubits long and five cubits wide; the altar shall be square, and its height shall be three cubits.

esv.text: “You shall make the altar of acacia wood, five cubits long and five cubits broad. The altar shall be square, and its height shall be three cubits.

cnv.text: “你要用皂莢木做祭壇，這壇要四方的：長兩公尺兩公寸，寬兩公尺兩公寸，高一公尺三公寸。

ccb.text: “要用皂荚木造一个四方形的祭坛，长宽各二点三米，高一点三米。
